extraction.one_line_summary: PEDERSEN Mads won uphill sprint finish in Limoges after Lidl-Trek controlled final 8km following aggressive JUMBO-VISMA pace-setting neutralized breakaway.
tactical_patterns: JUMBO-VISMA revealed sprint leadout capabilities for VAN AERT despite being GC-focused team, suggesting dual priorities.
LIDL-TREK perfectly timed final 8km takeover after JUMBO-VISMA burned matches chasing, exploiting rivals' earlier commitment.
VAN AERT got boxed in final 700m uphill despite strong leadout, indicating positioning vulnerability on technical uphill sprints.

rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: Beat PHILIPSEN on uphill finish after sustained pace, revealing superior punch on gradient-finish sprints.
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: First defeat of Tour on uphill finish despite green jersey dominance, exposed weakness on gradient sprints.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Boxed in crucial moment despite team control, tactical positioning error cost stage in uphill sprint.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Lost 47 seconds and dropped to 6th in crash with <6km to go, revealing fragile GC position.
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Abandoned Tour after crash, ending final Tour campaign.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: JUMBO-VISMA's prolonged pace-setting with 37km remaining suggests confidence in KUSS's climbing reserves for mountain stages.
